observations.result: Project is accessible, claimed, not password/SSO gated, and has primary URL. currentDeploy was returned as an empty object with no deploy id or commit metadata.
Attempting to read deploy id 6a3d97c09c879e4099009af6 returned 404.
Deploy action did not execute a deployment. It returned a local npx @netlify/mcp command that must be run from the source repository directory.

Container DNS resolution for https://monocle-man-review.netlify.app failed with Temporary failure in name resolution; web tool could not open the URL because it was not a search result or user-provided URL in that tool context.

required_next_diagnostic: Run the Netlify MCP deploy command from a checked-out grahama1970/snippets repository at commit 043f1a7c807a30b221ddd56cd3ea744b34c1dfd8, or use Netlify UI/API to trigger/inspect the deploy.
